original_text:
### Charts & Infographics
- Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
- **Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.** Placebo/comparator: neutral gray.
- Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).
- Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
- Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
- Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

relations.note: Chart color logic and container treatment jointly define chart appearance.
Headline styling sits within the chart container system.

quotes: Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.
Clean, easy to scan, consistent with the system. Container: uniform rounded corners, Light Blue (#E6F0F9) panel with a Brand Blue rounded header bar.

rules.intent: Keep charts visually consistent and scannable within the design system.
rules.rule_text: Charts must be clean, easy to scan and consistent with the system: the container uses uniform rounded corners (chart.radius = 12px), a Light Blue panel (chart.panel.fill = #E6F0F9) and a Brand Blue rounded header bar (chart.header_bar.fill = #00529b).

effect.reserved_for: emphasis on key figures/data points only
effect.subject: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a)

quotes: Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.
Color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) dominant; Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only.**

rules.intent: Reserve warm accent colors for emphasis so key data stands out and comparators stay neutral.
rules.rule_text: Chart color logic: Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) are dominant (chart.data.color = #00529b); Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) are reserved for emphasis on key figures/data points only. Placebo/comparator series use neutral gray.

quotes: Bars and chart icons: **rounded, approachable** shapes (rounded bar tops).

rules.intent: Convey an approachable brand tone through rounded chart geometry.
rules.rule_text: Bars and chart icons use rounded, approachable shapes (rounded bar tops).

quotes: Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.
Headline: Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), **ALL CAPS**, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath.

rules.intent: Give chart headlines a consistent, branded treatment.
rules.rule_text: Chart headlines set in Agenda (print) / Nunito Sans Bold+ (email), ALL CAPS (chart.headline.case), Brand Blue (chart.headline.color = #00529b), with a thin Gold rule beneath (Gold = #ffc60a).

quotes: Statistical callouts: **large and bold** (the % figure is the hero), supporting copy in a **lighter weight beneath**.
Footnotes: noticeably smaller, clearly separated from primary data.

rules.intent: Establish a clear visual hierarchy so the key statistic reads first and footnotes stay subordinate.
rules.rule_text: Statistical callouts are large and bold with the % figure as the hero; supporting copy sits in a lighter weight beneath. Footnotes are noticeably smaller and clearly separated from primary data.
